specific_question: What are the one-year-ahead price-hike expectations of Lee's Market products in Q3 2025?
justification: While price hikes can affect sales, 1-year price hikes will not impact sales-recovery tactics from a particular month (July 2025). So, they are not directly tied to on-floor associate behavior and do not provide any valuable input to sales associates.
dr_question: What are some ways for Lee's Market to enhance on-floor customer engagement to offset the impact of Canada’s July 2025 retail sales decline of 0.8% and drive a measurable rebound in the remaining months of 2025?
